zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida de Flandre-Boulogne於1161年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，她的父親Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne24歲，母親Marie de Blois25歲。她於1183年與Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund在法國結婚。她去世於1216年在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida de Flandre-Boulogne于1161年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，她的父亲Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne24岁，母亲Marie de Blois25岁。她于1183年与Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund在法国结婚。她去世于1216年在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida de Flandre-Boulogne was born in 1161, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, was 24 and her mother, Marie de Blois, was 25. She married Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund in 1183, in France. She died in 1216, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida de Flandre-Boulogne est née en 1161, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Marie de Blois, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund en 1183, à France. Elle est décédée en 1216, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida de Flandre-Boulogne 1161 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne 24 und ihre Mutter Marie de Blois 25. Sie hat 1183 in Frankreich Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund geheiratet. Sie starb 1216 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Flandre-Boulogne è nata il nel 1161 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Marie de Blois, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund nel 1183, nel Francia. Morì nel 1216, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida de Flandre-Boulogneが1161年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogneは24歳，母Marie de Bloisは25歳であった。1183年にフランスでBerthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgundと結婚した。彼女は1216年に故郷で55歳で死去し，フランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida de Flandre-Boulogne(이)가 1161년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Blois(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1183년 프랑스에서 Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1216년 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida de Flandre-Boulogne nasceu em 1161, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Blois, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund em 1183, em França. Ela faleceu em 1216, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida de Flandre-Boulogne родилась в 1161 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Blois, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund в 1183 г. в местности Франция. Она умерла в 1216 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida de Flandre-Boulogne nació en 1161, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Mathieu d'Alsace comte de Boulogne, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Marie de Blois, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Berthold IV. Herzog von Zähringen und Burgund en 1183, en Francia. Murió en 1216, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
